title: oxydectes miqueliana

side_effects: Oxydectes miqueliana can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high saponin content. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can lead to kidney damage and electrolyte imbalances, causing symptoms like muscle weakness, fatigue, and seizures. Overconsumption of the plant can also cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and respiratory distress. Furthermore, oxydectes miqueliana may interact with certain medications, including blood thinners and diabetes medications, leading to adverse effects.
